ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of user votes */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating (out of 10) */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "wr" REAL /* Weighted rating of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office earnings */,
  "mpaa_rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the cast */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_casts" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "num_movies_watched" INTEGER /* Number of movies watched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating (out of 10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpfulness_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpfulness votes */,
  "review_length" INTEGER /* Length of the review in characters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the movie is recommended to */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre */,
  "preferred_actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of a preferred actor */,
  "preferred_director_id" INTEGER /* ID of a preferred director */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_actor_id") REFERENCES casts ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the popularity score was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_popularity_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

ID of the user who wrote the review
ID of the movie being reviewed
Length of the review in characters
Unique identifier for each watchlist entry
